events.note: Carded after a failed attempt on 2026-07-20 was fully reverted. Native Electron drag-out (startDrag) worked - real filenames, multi-file drop - but the e.preventDefault() it required killed the shared HTML5 dragstart that in-app drops ride on, so dragging cards inside the library stopped reaching the prompt and landed as imported cards. Reverted all three files to HEAD; tree clean, nothing shipped. Root process failure: skipped the Context Router (components.md / gallery.md / events.md) and never asked what else consumed that dragstart. Card instructs the next agent to read the docs FIRST. Open and unexplained: pressing Cancel on the Windows file-conflict dialog exited the app, with no trace in app.log because main.js has no render-process-gone or uncaughtException handler.

Test-first card: does RAW + a speed-up LoRA match the Turbo transformer? If yes, drop ~24.5GB of Turbo weights and move Krea2 to the Qwen-Edit runtime tier-radio shape. Negative-prompt gating is currently structural (cfg 1 discards it) and would be LOST in a single-card collapse - flagged in the card as a design decision.

Picked up. Decision: aggressive source-filter of ComfyUI stdout (user has terminal access for INFO detail), delete destructive startup line-trim, gitignore logs/. Reporter 2000-char slice UNCHANGED (user: expanding it breaks GitHub issue creation, already empirically trimmed). R2-upload idea explicitly parked.
Orphaned-dep reclaim — 19GB B1-era LTX shared deps, no owner, no UI delete path.
Log architecture — split ComfyUI output out of app.log; reconcile line-trim vs byte-rotation.
doing -> todo (validating). Shared-dep bug fixed + user-verified locally; RunPod validation deferred.
Created in doing/investigating - local download reliability: failed-download resume, single-stream throughput ceiling, speed/ETA feedback.
